rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Fam. Code §58.0051, which governs interagency sharing of juvenile educational records. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 58.0051. INTERAGENCY SHARING OF EDUCATIONAL RECORDS.
_note: Rule text concerns juvenile educational records sharing; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
